build.notes: Build receives the Transitous-resolved Cluj-Napoca zip as seed (path passed via NEARY_SEED_ZIP env var by the pipeline). REPLACES calendar/trips/stop_times.txt with fresh data scraped daily from ctpcj.ro CSV timetables; keeps agency/routes/stops/shapes.txt from the seed pass-through. Routes without CSV data are skipped; their structural metadata is preserved.
